reviewPainQuotes: "...called incessantly to reschedule, please don't bother people a phone call and a voicemail message will suffice. They also didn't have a way to email them when I was a patient..."
subject: Saw something in your Google reviews — Downsview Plaza Dental
body:
Hi,

I was looking at Downsview Plaza Dental's Google reviews before reaching out.
One patient wrote: "called incessantly to reschedule, please don't bother people a phone call and a voicemail message will suffice. They also didn't have a way to email them when I was a patient"

That's exactly what I fix for dental clinics — automated follow-up so no call goes unanswered, and patients can reach you by text within 60 seconds instead of waiting for a callback.

Free audit, 10 minutes, no commitment.

Worth a look?

Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation
438-544-0442
